Class GraphPresetGenerator

java.lang.Object
io.graphite.generator.preset.GraphPresetGenerator
public class GraphPresetGenerator extends Object
Provides a collection of predefined graphs commonly used for testing, benchmarking, demonstrations, and algorithm evaluation.

GraphPresetGenerator offers factory methods for constructing frequently used graph configurations such as sparse graphs, dense graphs, weighted graphs, trees, directed acyclic graphs (DAGs), and bipartite graphs. These presets provide consistent graph structures suitable for examples, benchmarks, and automated testing.

Available Presets

  • Traversal graphs
  • Shortest path graphs
  • Minimum spanning tree graphs
  • Dense and sparse graphs
  • Weighted graphs
  • Directed graphs
  • Tree graphs
  • Directed acyclic graphs
  • Bipartite graphs

Implementation Notes

Each preset delegates graph construction to the appropriate builder or pattern generator while applying sensible default parameters.

Since:
2.0
Version:
2.0
Author:
Chinmay

  • PatternGraphBuilder
